title: Natalie Baclawski
text:
Hello! My name is Natalie Baclawski and this is my personal website created using Quarto.


I am currently a graduate student at BU’s MET College, pursuing a Masters in Business Analytics while working in the finance industry.




Data Analysis
Python
SQL
Excel Modeling
Financial Analysis




Here are some projects I am/have worked on:

Boston Property Value Analysis
Northwind SQL Database Analysis
Time Series Forecasting in R
